rulings.Case Title: ROBERT LUNDQUIST VS. ASBESTOS CORPORATION LIMITED
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendant J-M Manufacturing Company, Inc.S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 15, 2015 in Department 503, Line 1. Defendant J-M Manufacturing Company, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment is continued to April 21, 2015 per agreement of the parties. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT LUNDQUIST VS. ASBESTOS CORPORATION LIMITED
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 15, 2015 in Department 503, Line 1. Defendant Boss Manufacturing Company's motion for summary judgment or, in the alternative, summary adjudication is off calendar at the moving party's request. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN CHOW et al VS. ASBESTOS CORPORATION LIMITED et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 15, 2015 in Department 503, Line 2. Plaintiffs' motion for leave to file first amended complaint is continued on the court's own motion to April 22, 2015. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: RICHARD JOHNSON ET AL VS. INGERSOLL-RAND COMPANY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Or Dismiss
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 15, 2015 in Department 503, Line 3. Defendant Moore Dry Dock Company's motion to stay or dismiss on the grounds of forum non conveniens is continued on the court's own motion to April 16, 2015. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: RICHARD JOHNSON ET AL VS. INGERSOLL-RAND COMPANY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Owens-Illinois, Inc.S Joinder In Defendant Moore Dry Dock Companys Motion To Stay Or Dismiss For Forum Non Conveniens
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 15, 2015 in Department 503, Line 3. Defendant Owens-Illinois, Inc.'s joinder in Moore Dry Dock Company's motion to stay or dismiss on the grounds of forum non conveniens is continued on the court's own motion to April 16, 2015. = (503/TLJ)
